hooks.command: command -v rtk >/dev/null 2>&1 && rtk hook claude || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -qE '(lint-staged\.config\.mjs|eslint\.config\.js)' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"This is a quality gate file — editing it can silently disable linting or formatting for committed files. Confirm this change is intentional."}}' || true
